title: AgentResults
description: The numbers the Analyst's R script actually produced, one entry per target id in target-results.yaml. CRITICAL: every value here must originate from executed R output captured by the sandbox runner - the Analyst is forbidden from writing a number it did not compute. The 'source' field ties each value back to the line/object in reproduce_<study>.R that produced it.

script.description: Filename of the artifact script, e.g. reproduce_P-5297.R

seed.description: The RNG seed set in the script for determinism.

exit_code.description: Non-zero => the run is invalid; Comparator must not score it.

sessionInfo.description: Captured sessionInfo() for the artifact bundle.

produced_by.description: Which producer made analytic.parquet - both share one schema, but this records provenance.

target_id.description: Must match an id in target-results.yaml.

source.description: Where in the R output this came from, e.g. 'coef(cox_os)["age_grp>=70"]' or 'summary(cif_nrm)$est at t=12'. Enables audit that no number was fabricated.

not_computed_reason.description: Set ONLY when observed is null because the target is not-reproducible - explains why the script legitimately did not compute it.
